# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the **Contributor Covenant** (v2.1) as its code of conduct.
The full text is available at:

https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/

## In short

Be respectful and constructive. Harassment, discrimination, and personal
attacks are not tolerated. We want participation in this project to be a
welcoming experience for everyone, regardless of background.

## Enforcement

Report unacceptable behaviour to **conduct@dsa-api.com**. Reports are handled
confidentially. Maintainers may remove comments, commits, issues, or
contributors that violate this code.
